title: Descript vs Otter vs Fireflies: Best AI Transcription Tool 2026
description: Comprehensive comparison of Descript, Otter, and Fireflies for AI transcription. Find the best tool for your needs in 2026.
content: # Descript vs Otter vs Fireflies: Best AI Transcription Tool 2026 AI transcription tools have revolutionized how we handle audio and video content, making it easier to transcribe meetings, podcasts, interviews, and videos. Three of the top players are **Descript**, **Otter AI**, and **Fireflies AI**—but which one is right for you? In this comprehensive comparison, we'll break down their features, strengths, weaknesses, and use cases to help you decide. --- ## What Are AI Transcription Tools? AI transcription tools use artificial intelligence to convert spoken language into written text. They're used for: - **Meeting notes**: Transcribe and summarize meetings - **Podcast production**: Create transcripts and captions - **Interviews**: Document conversations and research - **Video content**: Add captions and searchable transcripts - **Accessibility**: Make content accessible to deaf and hard-of-hearing users --- ## Comparison at a Glance | Feature | Descript | Otter AI | Fireflies AI | |---------|----------|----------|--------------| | **Accuracy** | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | | **Pricing** | ⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | | **Editing Features** | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐ | | **Video Support** | ✅ Yes | ❌ Limited | ❌ No | | **AI Summary** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | | **Free Plan** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | --- ## Descript: The All-in-One Editor Descript stands out with its unique text-based editing approach: ### Strengths - **Text-based editing**: Edit audio/video by editing the transcript - **Video support**: Full-featured video editing alongside audio - **Overdub**: AI voice cloning for voiceovers - **Studio Sound**: One-click audio enhancement - **Filler word removal**: Auto-remove "um"s, "ah"s, and pauses - **Multi-track**: Layer audio, music, and effects ### Weaknesses - More expensive than competitors for advanced features - Learning curve for first-time users - Mobile app is less full-featured than desktop ### Best For Podcasters, video creators, and anyone who needs to edit as well as transcribe. **Pricing**: Free plan (3 hours/month); Creator at $12/month; Pro at $24/month. --- ## Otter AI: The Meeting Specialist Otter AI is built specifically for meetings and note-taking: ### Strengths - **Meeting integration**: Works with Zoom, Teams, Google Meet - **Real-time transcription**: See transcripts as meetings happen - **Speaker identification**: Labels who said what - **Otter Assistant**: AI assistant that joins meetings automatically - **Highlighting**: Tag and highlight key moments - **Calendar integration**: Schedules recordings automatically ### Weaknesses - Limited video editing features - Less robust for podcast production - Customization options are limited ### Best For Teams, remote workers, and anyone who needs great meeting notes. **Pricing**: Free plan (600 mins/month); Pro at $10/month; Business at $20/month. --- ## Fireflies AI: The Affordable Workhorse Fireflies AI offers great value and solid features: ### Strengths - **Affordable pricing**: Great free plan and low-cost paid tiers - **CRM integration**: Works with Salesforce, HubSpot, and more - **AI summarization**: Generates meeting summaries and key points - **Search**: Search across all your transcripts - **Collaboration**: Share and comment on transcripts - **Multiple languages**: Supports 30+ languages ### Weaknesses - No video editing features - Interface is less polished than competitors - Fewer advanced editing options ### Best For Budget-conscious users, small businesses, and sales teams. **Pricing**: Free plan (800 mins/month); Pro at $10/month; Business at $19/month. --- ## Detailed Feature Comparison ### Accuracy & Languages | Aspect | Descript | Otter AI | Fireflies AI | |--------|----------|----------|--------------| | **English Accuracy** | Excellent | Very Good | Very Good | | **Languages Supported** | 30+ | 30+ | 30+ | | **Speaker Identification** | Excellent | Excellent | Good | ### Editing & Features | Aspect | Descript | Otter AI | Fireflies AI | |--------|----------|----------|--------------| | **Text-based Editing** | ✅ Yes | ❌ No | ❌ No | | **Video Editing** | ✅ Yes | ❌ No | ❌ No | | **AI Summary** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | | **Filler Removal** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | | **Voice Cloning** | ✅ Yes | ❌ No | ❌ No | ### Pricing Comparison | Plan | Descript | Otter AI | Fireflies AI | |------|----------|----------|--------------| | **Free** | 3 hrs/month | 600 mins/month | 800 mins/month | | **Pro** | $24/month | $10/month | $10/month | | **Business** | $48/month | $20/month | $19/month | --- ## Which Should You Choose? | Use Case | Recommended | Why | |----------|------------|-----| | **Podcasting** | Descript | Best editing and production features | | **Video Creation** | Descript | Only one with full video support | | **Meeting Notes** | Otter AI | Best meeting integration and real-time features | | **Small Business** | Fireflies AI | Great value and CRM integration | | **Budget Users** | Fireflies AI | Best free plan and low-cost tiers | | **Remote Teams** | Otter AI | Best team collaboration features | --- ## Related Resources - **[[link:/category/Audio|Audio tools]]**: Explore more AI audio tools. - **[[link:/blog/best-ai-audio-tools-game-sound-design-2026|AI Sound Design Tools]]**: For creative audio projects. - **[[link:/blog/best-ai-writing-tools-creative-writing-2026|AI Writing Tools]]**: For creative content creation. --- ## Conclusion All three tools are excellent, but they serve different needs. **Descript** is the clear choice for podcasters and video creators who need editing features. **Otter AI** is perfect for teams and remote workers who prioritize meeting notes. **Fireflies AI** offers the best value for budget-conscious users and small businesses. Consider your specific needs and choose the tool that fits your workflow best. **Ready to start transcribing?** Try Descript Try Otter AI *Updated: 2026-05-28 | Category: [[link:/category/Audio|Audio]]*
